search_terms_used: deep water running aqua jogging systematic review running fitness pubmed
cross training modalities running fitness transfer cycling elliptical pubmed
deep water running VO2max maintenance injury runners pubmed
elliptical trainer running performance comparison pubmed
cross training cardiovascular transfer specificity running pubmed
post marathon recovery cross training active recovery pubmed
coverage_notes: Good coverage: 1 systematic review on deep water running (Kwok 2022), foundational DWR studies (Bushman 1997, Wilber 1996), elliptical comparison (Klein 2016), cross-training in high school runners (Paquette 2018), post-marathon recovery (Martinez-Navarro 2021), energy expenditure comparison across modalities (Bosch 2021), and transfer specificity review (Tanaka 1994). Running-specific populations well represented.

papers.title: A Systematic Review of Deep Water Running as an Alternative to Land-Based Running for Improving Physical Performance
papers.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed evidence on deep water running as alternative to land-based running for maintaining/improving physical performance during injury or supplementary training.

papers.title: Comparison of Elliptical Training, Stationary Cycling, Treadmill Walking and Overground Walking
papers.journal: Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
papers.notes: Compared physiological responses (VO2, HR, RPE) across elliptical, cycling, treadmill walking, and overground walking at matched intensities.

papers.title: Cross-Training and VO2max in High School Cross-Country Runners
papers.journal: Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
papers.notes: Examined whether supplementary cross-training (cycling, elliptical) improved VO2max and race performance in high school cross-country runners.

papers.title: Post-Marathon Recovery: Is Active or Passive Recovery Better for Subsequent Performance?
papers.notes: Compared active recovery (cross-training) vs passive recovery following a marathon on subsequent performance markers and muscle damage.

papers.title: Effect of 4 wk of deep water run training on running performance
papers.journal: Medicine and Science in Sports and Exercise
papers.notes: Examined whether 4 weeks of deep water running maintained running performance (VO2max, economy) compared to land-based training.

papers.title: Influence of water run training on the maintenance of aerobic performance
papers.journal: Medicine and Science in Sports and Exercise
papers.notes: Examined whether deep water running maintained aerobic performance (VO2max, treadmill time) over 6 weeks in trained runners compared to land-based training.

papers.title: Energy Expenditure during Treadmill Walking, Elliptical and Stair Stepper Exercise with Matched Oxygen Consumption
papers.journal: International Journal of Sport Nutrition and Exercise Metabolism
papers.notes: Compared energy expenditure across treadmill, elliptical, and stair stepper at matched oxygen consumption to determine relative exercise equivalency.

papers.title: Effects of cross-training. Transfer of training effects on VO2max between cycling, running and swimming
papers.notes: Reviewed evidence on transfer of training effects between cycling, running, and swimming, examining specificity principle and practical cross-training applications.
